# technitium_dns_apps (Data Source)

Lists installed DNS apps on a Technitium DNS Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "technitium_dns_apps" "all" {}

output "installed_apps" {
  value = data.technitium_dns_apps.all.apps[*].name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `apps` (Attributes List) List of installed DNS apps. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--apps))

<a id="nestedatt--apps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `apps`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The name of the DNS app.
- `version` (String) The installed version of the DNS app.
